title: virattt/ai-hedge-fund
summary: An open-source project that models a multi-agent investment research team, with agents for analysis, portfolio decisions, and market reasoning. The repo remains active, with recent updates adding model providers and interface improvements.
friendlySummary: This repo simulates a team of AI agents that look at markets and investment data.
whyItMatters: It is a practical sandbox for studying multi-agent decision workflows, financial-analysis prompts, and how different model providers affect a structured research pipeline. It should be treated as an educational tool, not financial advice.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help developers learn how multi-agent systems work in a finance-style workflow. It is for learning and experiments, not real investment advice.
